ground_truth.title: Legal Aid - Nevada 211
ground_truth.main_content: Nevada 211 services that provide low-cost and/or free legal aid for people who need counseling in legal matters, such as bankruptcy, housing, public benefits, family law, elder law or immigration/naturalization. The page features a resource search interface allowing users to search for legal aid services using zip code, county and city, or keyword searches. Search results are displayed with a map view and pagination options.
with: Nevada 211 services that provide low-cost and/or free legal aid for people who need counseling in legal matters
Search Using Zip Code: Searching with your zip code is the best way to find services in your area
Search Using County and City: You can also search by county and city, but the results may not be as accurate as using a zip code
Start a New Search: Enter keyword(s) in the box below and click Search to start a new, unrelated search
Ready to search: Use the filters on the left to find resources
